title: FlameFrags SMP overlay
description: This is a fan made PvP essentials from FlameFrags videos
body:
This is a fan made pvp essentials texturepack from flamefrags videos.(i made it the textures in 
- ignore the warning ,the texturepack still works
- if you have sodium the fullbright doesnt work install:[Gamma utils](https://modrinth.com/project/wdLuzzEP)
## Contens
- small crits
- small enchant particles
- visible wither hearts
- low shield and fire
- brewingstand helper
- and much more
##  Why you should use this?
- if you are a flamefrags fan and want to be like him, use this pack
- if you arent it is good for pvp and survival
##   Other
This is [flamefrags weapon overlay](https://modrinth.com/project/E8PDOoNW)
- Other stuff in my profile
